listings.title: Microphone and Stand
listings.body: Microphone and stand setup that I need gone ASAP. Pickup only $20 or willing to trade for tech .

listings.title: WEMAX android TV PROJECTOR
listings.body: The WEMAX Dice is a highly portable, battery-powered smart projector featuring native 1080p resolution, 700 ANSI lumens, and built-in Android TV 9.0. Designed for both indoor and outdoor use, it includes a built-in 16,000 mAh battery (good for up to 3 hours of playback), autofocus, and automatic keystone correction for quick, hassle-free setup.Key FeaturesDisplay & Brightness: Projects vibrant, sharp images up to 120+ inches. Delivers 700 ANSI lumens, maintaining full brightness even when running off the internal battery.Smart Capabilities: Built-in Android TV 9.0 gives you direct access to the Google Play Store, YouTube, and thousands of other streaming apps right out of the box.Audio: Equipped with dual 5W speakers that are Dolby Audio and DTS-HD certified.Portability: Features a rugged, compact design with a built-in carry handle, making it easy to move from room to room or take to an outdoor movie night.Connectivity: Includes Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, an HDMI port, a USB port, and a headphone jack.Setup: Smart autofocus and 4-point keystone correction (vertical and horizontal) ensure a perfectly aligned picture without manual fiddling. I used this once and put it back in box. It’s very impressive.
